briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — The Synapse bankruptcy has left thousands of Americans unable to access their savings, highlighting critical risks in fintech middleware and banking-as-a-service models.

- **[Goodbye Visa and Mastercard: 130M Europeans switching to sovereign payment](https://www.lesnumeriques.com/banque-en-ligne/adieu-visa-et-mastercard-130-millions-d-europeens-basculent-vers-un-paiement-100-souverain-des-2026-n250918.html)** — *Hacker News* — Over 130 million Europeans are set to transition to a sovereign payments network, challenging the dominance of Visa and Mastercard across the continent.

- **[Backcountry and Affirm partner to give outdoor enthusiasts a transparent way to pay over time](https://financialpost.com/pmn/business-wire-news-releases-pmn/backcountry-and-affirm-partner-to-give-outdoor-enthusiasts-a-transparent-way-to-pay-over-time)** — *Financial Post* — Outdoor retailer Backcountry has partnered with BNPL provider Affirm to offer flexible, transparent instalment payment options to its customers.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep-dive analysis explores how open banking frameworks are reshaping competition in the payments landscape globally.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Luma Financial Technologies and TD Securities to Bring Enhanced Structured Products Management to Canadian Investment Professionals](https://financialpost.com/pmn/business-wire-news-releases-pmn/luma-financial-technologies-and-td-securities-to-bring-enhanced-structured-products-management-to-canadian-investment-professionals)** — *Financial Post* — Luma Financial Technologies is partnering with TD Securities to deliver advanced lifecycle management, analytics, and performance reporting for structured products across Canada's wealth management sector.

- **[Restaurants call on courts to force XTM to repay missing funds](https://betakit.com/restaurants-call-on-courts-to-force-xtm-to-repay-missing-funds/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian restaurant operators are seeking a court order to compel fintech payments company XTM to return funds they allege have gone missing.

- **[Canada's early-stage startup funding is in a sustained decline, RBCx finds](https://betakit.com/canadas-early-stage-startup-funding-is-in-a-sustained-decline-rbcx-finds/)** — *BetaKit* — A new RBCx report reveals a persistent and concerning drop in early-stage venture funding across Canada's startup ecosystem.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — Canada's federal government flagged screen scraping as a security risk and committed to an open banking framework, underscoring the ongoing regulatory journey still relevant to today's implementation discussions.

- **[Enabled Talent's new program aims to help disabled Canadians become entrepreneurs](https://betakit.com/enabled-talents-new-program-aims-to-help-disabled-canadians-become-entrepreneurs/)** — *BetaKit* — Enabled Talent has launched a new initiative designed to support disabled Canadians in building their own businesses, advancing financial inclusion and entrepreneurship equity.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Klue hack leads to customer data breach](https://betakit.com/klue-hack-leads-to-customer-data-breach/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian competitive intelligence startup Klue suffered a cyberattack resulting in a customer data breach, a timely reminder for Atlantic fintech companies about the growing importance of cybersecurity and data governance.

- **[Fintech dystopia](https://fintechdystopia.com/)** — *Hacker News* — This resource cataloguing fintech failures and consumer harms is a relevant reference for Atlantic Canadian credit unions and regulators thinking critically about responsible fintech ecosystem development.

- **[Why a 25% discount on airfare cost a Montreal couple more — thanks to dynamic pricing](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/dynamic-pricing-sale-fare-air-canada-9.7246024?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — A CBC investigation into dynamic pricing confusion highlights the broader consumer transparency issues that fintech innovators and embedded finance players in Atlantic Canada have an opportunity to address.
